meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode Aerospace Village - Alex Lomas, Ken Munro -747  Walkthru From a Hacker Perspective
meta.description: This will be a tour of an end of life 747 airframe, covering a 101 of the cockpit systems and avionics bays. We will also be explaining the various systems & threat surfaces.
